zh.Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗
zh.Smallbridge, Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk,: 英國英格蘭素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane de Durward於1400年出生在英國素福爾可時，她的父親John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire45歲，母親Katherine Wallcott38歲。她於1419年與Sir William Waldegrave在英國素福爾可布勒斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1450年10月9日在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane de Durward于1400年出生在英国素福爾可时，她的父亲John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire45岁，母亲Katherine Wallcott38岁。她于1419年与Sir William Waldegrave在英国素福爾可布勒斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1450年10月9日在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Durward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dorward
meanings: English and Scottish (Angus and Fife): occupational name from Older Scots, Middle English dor(e)ward ‘doorkeeper, porter’ (Old English duru-weard). In medieval Scotland the office of the king's doorward, Hostiarius regis, was hereditary and of considerable honor. The specific surname still common around Arbroath is probably from the office of doorward of the Abbey. The 13th-century royal ushers or doorwards of Scotland were based at Lundie in Angus.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane de Durward was born in 1400, in Suffolk, England, her father, John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire, was 45 and her mother, Katherine Wallcott, was 38. She married Sir William Waldegrave in 1419, in Bures, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 9 October 1450, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane de Durward est née en 1400, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Katherine Wallcott, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Waldegrave en 1419, à Bures, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 octobre 1450, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.Smallbridge, Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk,: Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Joane de Durward 1400 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire 45 und ihre Mutter Katherine Wallcott 38. Sie hat 1419 in Bures, Suffolk, England Sir William Waldegrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Oktober 1450 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane de Durward è nata il nel 1400 nel Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Katherine Wallcott, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Waldegrave nel 1419, nel Bures, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 ottobre 1450, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane de Durwardが1400年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshireは45歳，母Katherine Wallcottは38歳であった。1419年にイギリススフォルクブレスでSir William Waldegraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1450年10月9日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane de Durward(이)가 1400년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Wallcott(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 수폴크 버스에서 Sir William Waldegrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 10월 9일 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane de Durward nasceu em 1400, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Wallcott, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Waldegrave em 1419, em Bures, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de outubro de 1450, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.Smallbridge, Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk,: буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane de Durward родилась в 1400 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Wallcott, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Waldegrave в 1419 г. в местности буресь, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 октября 1450 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane de Durward nació en 1400, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Doreward Sheriff of Essex and Herefordshire, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Katherine Wallcott, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir William Waldegrave en 1419, en Bures, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de octubre de 1450, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años.
